A '''Nightblade''' was a short melee weapon<ref name="SWG:NN" /> crafted by the natives of [[Utapau]]. It was sometimes referred to as an '''Utapaun Nightblade'''.<ref name="TSoGG" />

The [[N-K Necrosis]] droid, built using the lifeless, cyborg body of [[General]] [[Grievous]], carried an [[Utapaun]] Nightblade as part of its arsenal.<ref name="TSoGG" /> When the Necrosis droid was destroyed in the [[Myyydril Caverns]] of [[Kashyyyk]] by a group of spacers, its possessions were looted, including the Nightblade.<ref name="SWG:NKN">{{SWGcite|exp=RotW|type=heroic|N-K Necrosis}}</ref>
